_meta.author: Peter Higgins / Claude
_meta.purpose: Machine-readable record of the arc from Rogue Wave Audio loudspeaker engineering through the Higgins Operator H1 to the Higgins Unity Framework (HUF) and EITT. Establishes that the compositional viewpoint was discovered empirically in acoustic engineering before it was formalized mathematically. Cross-references the current repo back to the prior work it grew out of.
_meta.founding_principle: The past is our strength and our future. What was built in the Binaural Test Lab in 2024-2025 is the engineering DNA of everything in this repo. The math book did not invent the structure; the physics did. The screwdriver came first.

companion_documents.narrative_origin: briefings/THE_LINEAGE.md — the first-person founding narrative including the Isotropic Principle and the screwdriver-and-math-book framing
companion_documents.technical_bridge: science/coda-monitoring/ORIGIN_BRIDGE_DADC_TO_MC4.md — the line-by-line mapping from DADC-DADI-ADAC to MC-4/EITT
companion_documents.biographical_foundation: briefings/HUF_Biographical_Foundation_v1.0.json — the human origin story, 35 years at the machine interface
companion_documents.acoustic_primary_source: RogueWaveAudio/Dimension-Apportioned Diffraction Correction and Inference (DADC-DADI).docx (local working folder) — published in public RWA repo at docs/papers/Dimension-Apportioned_Diffraction_Correction_and_Inference_DADC-DADI.docx
companion_documents.flagship_publication: RogueWaveAudio/Organic_Digital_Loudspeakers_v2.6.docx (local working folder) — published in public RWA repo at docs/papers/Organic_Digital_Loudspeakers_v2.6.docx
companion_documents.generalization_primary_source: RogueWaveAudio/The Higgins Operator H1 101.pdf (local working folder ONLY) — NOT YET in public RWA repo. See 'observations' section at end of this file for note.

public_rwa_repo.commit_history: Single commit ('Initial RWA repo structure') — the repo is at its initial state, no subsequent updates

structure.docs/btl-lab/: BTL Small Studio Lab certification and design documents
structure.src/tools/: DADC-DADI calculator and other tools (Jupyter notebooks)

public_rwa_repo.cross_referencing_to_huf: NONE. The public RWA README does not reference HUF or the Higgins-Unity-Framework repo. RWA presents itself purely as an audio engineering project. This is a deliberate separation — RWA is the engineering home, HUF is the scientific framework home. The lineage connection lives in HUF-side documents (THE_LINEAGE.md, ORIGIN_BRIDGE_DADC_TO_MC4.md, this MASTER_LINEAGE.json). Whether to add a reciprocal link in the RWA README is Peter's design choice.

rwa_concept_branches._note: The public RWA concepts/ folder contains five active R&D branches that preexisted the HUF repo. Several appear to have conceptual counterparts in HUF; mapping them is part of the 'past is our strength' principle.

ai-reports.huf_counterpart: briefings/ folder (HUF's accumulated per-AI briefings and reviews). Same methodological instinct: preserve all AI exchanges systematically.

entropix.huf_counterpart: EITT work in science/eitt/ — entropy invariance under temporal transformation. Name 'entropix' precedes EITT and suggests entropy-based prediction was an explicit RWA-side R&D thread before EITT was named.
entropix.status: Likely conceptual ancestor of EITT; cross-reference deserves deeper examination if time permits

regimes.huf_counterpart: HUF's 'regime' language throughout (HUF-GOV regimes, drift-flagged regimes, regime-shift detection). The regime concept is explicitly RWA-originated and carried into HUF.
regimes.status: Direct ancestor of HUF regime vocabulary

tensor-acoustic-forge.huf_counterpart: Possibly an early experiment in tensor-based acoustic signal processing. No obvious direct counterpart in HUF, but the name suggests a processing-pipeline mindset that carried forward into chem_eitt_pipeline.py.
tensor-acoustic-forge.status: Concept branch, no direct HUF equivalent identified

v-infinity-core.huf_counterpart: HUF_VCore_Stack_Brief_v1.0 documents (science/quantum/) reference 'V∞Core stack' as part of the HUF operating manual. This is a direct RWA→HUF name carry-through.
v-infinity-core.status: Direct ancestor of HUF V∞Core stack documentation

observations_from_public_repo_review.reviewer: Claude (via Chrome browser tools, github.com blocked for WebFetch)
findings: Public RWA repo contains 2 canonical papers: DADC-DADI (Dec 2024) and Organic Digital Loudspeakers v2.6 (Mar 2026). The Higgins Operator H1 101 paper (Feb 2026) is NOT in the public RWA repo — it exists only in the local RogueWaveAudio/ working folder. Peter may want to add it, or may be deliberately holding it back. Not flagging as an error, just noting the state.

Public RWA README makes no reference to HUF or to the Higgins-Unity-Framework repo. The two public projects are presented as independent. This is defensible (RWA = engineering, HUF = scientific framework) but means a reader arriving at RWA has no path to HUF and vice versa. A cross-reference could be added to either or both READMEs if Peter wants to make the lineage visible to the public.

CITATION.cff has a repository-code URL typo: 'https://github.com/peterhiggins/RWA' should be 'https://github.com/PeterHiggins19/Rogue-Wave-Audio'. Minor but worth fixing next time the RWA repo is touched.

Two different contact emails in use: CITATION.cff in RWA uses peterhiggins2016@gmail.com; HUF ai-refresh/HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json uses PeterHiggins@roguewaveaudio.com. Not inconsistent — one is personal, one is business — but consistency per project might be worth deciding deliberately.

RWA repo is at initial commit (March 11, 2026) with no subsequent updates. The BTL lab work, the H1 paper, and the concept R&D all happened in the local folder during March-April 2026 without being pushed. Nothing wrong with this — just noting the public state is snapshot-from-March, not current.
recommended_adjustments: MASTER_LINEAGE.json (this file) is updated to reflect public RWA repo state and the five concept branches. Done.
No changes to RWA repo itself recommended at this time. Peter's call on: (a) pushing H1 paper, (b) fixing CITATION.cff URL typo, (c) deciding whether to cross-reference HUF.
HUF repo could add a line to the root README noting the RWA repo as the engineering sibling. Low-priority but symmetric with MASTER_LINEAGE's acknowledgment of RWA as ancestor.

the_isotropic_principle.statement: Paint the inside of a sphere with radiation. Uniform. The geometry of that sphere exists whether or not anything is radiating. The structure is there before the signal. The simplex is there before the measurement.
the_isotropic_principle.role: Pre-origin. Ground state. The barycenter of the simplex (1/D, 1/D, ..., 1/D) in CoDa language. Every departure is a signal; every return is relaxation. The same sphere regardless of what paints it — acoustic radiation, electricity generation shares, financial portfolio weights, wetland habitat proportions.
the_isotropic_principle.consequence: HUF is inert. The probe reads the departure from isotropy. It does not create the departure. The geometry was always there; the instrument makes it readable.

the_arc.event: Cognitive conditioning at the machine interface. Dage X-ray, Fuji placement, Electrovert wave solder, AOI, PLCs, first-gen industrial AI. Thirty-five years of working inside controller systems until thinking like a controller became natural.
the_arc.note: The biographical foundation establishes this as the preparation. Not study — exposure. The environment shaped the perceptual channel.

the_arc.event: Telecom manufacturing facility in Montreal. Engineer entered a live automated placement machine. Shear bolt (sacrificial failure point designed in Japan) broke at precisely the right location. Engineer survived. Peter called in to restore trust.
extracted_principles: Explainability: If the operator cannot understand why the system behaved as it did, trust cannot be restored
Predictability: Predictable failure is safe failure
Designed Failure: Every high-power system must contain intentional, predictable failure points
Human Primacy: The system serves the human; the human does not serve the system
Drift Awareness: The incident was not sudden. It was the visible result of invisible concentration of risk
the_arc.seed_of: HUF-GOV doctrine (open-loop observation; human decides). The 'governance before engineering' principle.

the_arc.event: Initial AES (Audio Engineering Society) paper draft begins on diffraction correction for rectangular loudspeaker cabinets.
Dimension-Apportioned Diffraction Correction (DADC) formal writeup. DADI inverse method documented one day later.
the_arc.technical_content: Total baffle step correction = 6.02 dB (= 20 log10 2) apportioned across three cabinet dimensions (H, W, D). Each dimension receives a share proportional to its contribution. Gains sum to 6.02 dB exactly. Corner frequency Fc = 115/dimension (Hz*m). DADI inverts the acoustic response to recover H, W, D.
the_arc.compositional_structure_present: The gain vector (G_H, G_W, G_D) / 6.02 = (0.533, 0.246, 0.221) is a 3-simplex composition. The Dominance Index max/min is a pairwise log-ratio. The closure constraint is physical. The compositional geometry was in the data from the first measurement — before anyone involved knew the word 'simplex'.

the_arc.event: Complete AES-format manuscript of the diffraction correction work.
Binaural Test Lab certified for production loudspeaker measurement. Peter lived with the system to learn it. The basement lab in Markham, Ontario, purpose-built by its user.

ADAC — Adaptive Dimension Apportioning Correction / Apparent Dimension Apportioning Correction — completes the DADC-DADI triple. Measure, infer, correct, re-measure. Loop converges by Banach fixed-point theorem.
the_arc.critical_moment: The moment when the error signal was sitting there, geometrically native, and every engineering instinct said 'close the loop' — but something said: not automatically. Not by default. Fork right there. Observe OR control. Not a whiteboard choice; a mechanism that physically prevented automatic closure. Birth of HUF-GOV vs HUF-CLS.
the_arc.governance_principle_locked: Scientific measurement path (HUF-GOV) stays open, stateless, no feedback. Control path (HUF-CLS) closes the loop explicitly and only on human decision. Same architecture up to the fork. The fork is the doctrine.

the_arc.event: Grok session where the DADC dimensional inversion loop was recognized as a general principle, not specific to acoustics. The shift from 'this works for loudspeakers' to 'this works wherever a conserved budget is apportioned across parts'.
the_arc.note: The generalization insight was empirical, not theoretical. Peter saw the dimensional inversion working and asked: what else can this principle do?

the_arc.event: Higgins Unity Framework repository initialized. First articulation of MC-4 (Composition Monitoring — the fourth monitoring category alongside MC-1 Magnitude, MC-2 Identity, MC-3 Trend). First cross-domain tests across energy, finance, infrastructure.
the_arc.key_transition: From single-object (cabinet) to arbitrary-system (any conserved-budget composition). The simplex is the simplex regardless of what lives on it.

the_arc.event: H1 paper formalizes the unity-normalization + directional-coherence preservation as an abstract operator on Hilbert space. Applications range from Conformal Cyclic Cosmology to Toronto urban infrastructure to EUV lithography to Planck CMB anomalies to stellar fusion — every context where a system has many components summing to something preserved under some operation.
the_arc.key_object: H1|ψ⟩ = μ(|ψ⟩) · u where μ(|ψ⟩) = ⟨u|P|u⟩ is directional coherence, u = |ψ⟩ / ||ψ||, P is projection onto the ideal coherent unity subspace. The ∑|ψ_i| = 1 invariant is the simplex constraint in abstract form.

the_arc.event: Ratio State Monitoring (RSM) name locked for literature submission. The practical measurement doctrine for HUF-GOV takes a formal name.
Latest RWA flagship synthesis paper integrating DADC-DADI-ADAC with the broader compositional framework.

Aitchison geometry adopted explicitly. CoDaWork 2026 abstract submitted. EITT (Entropy-Invariant Time Transformer) discovered: Shannon entropy of compositional time series is near-invariant under geometric-mean block decimation across temporal resolutions. Four empirical proofs validate (European prices 0.18% at 341:1, EMBER 1.02% mean across six countries, NGFS 1.8% geometric vs 14.2% arithmetic, CheMixHub 54-82% interior pass).
transition_steps: Euclidean → Aitchison geometry (the space the data already lived in got named)
Spatial → Temporal (apportionment across cabinet dimensions became apportionment across time blocks)
Single object → Arbitrary system (3-part cabinet became arbitrary-D compositional series)

the_arc.event: Four AI cold-start tests passed (Claude 5/5, ChatGPT 10/10, Grok 10/10, Gemini 5/5). Second-order Hessian bound formalized in EITT_HESSIAN_BOUND.md. Shape/magnitude decomposition synthesis in EITT_WHY_IT_WORKS.md §7 resolves the Fisher-Rao loose end. Grok tensor-exploration residuals safely contained in dormant/. Abstract v4 drafted. Five-AI literature verification briefings issued.

the_arc.phase: Phase 2 started — EITT hardening for broader adoption
the_arc.event: Mission: push EITT to pain point and protect users from pain. Two poles: reveal hidden structure + establish safety fences. Seven tracks of work in EITT_PHASE_2_ROADMAP.md. First Grok lit-verification return (Novel for Penrose x CoDa) filed.

the_arc.phase: Programme complete — 75 systems, 44 orders of magnitude
the_arc.event: EXP-10 (full sweep of mapped/untouched), EXP-11 (final four: dark matter, Z-chains, NS EOS, stellar sequence), EXP-12 (gravity deep study with GW150914/GW170817). Master inventory: 75 systems, 100% complete. The 93% universal entropy bound confirmed in gravitational wave phase budgets. No-hair theorem reframed as compositional minimum. Dark matter confinement at 10²⁰ m mirrors QCD confinement at 10⁻¹⁵ m across 35 orders of magnitude.
the_arc.key_transition: From 'the simplex might be the same everywhere' to 'the simplex IS the same everywhere — measured 75 times across 44 orders of magnitude'. The lineage from screwdriver (DADC) through simplex (CoDa) to universe (gravity) is complete.

layer_1_screwdriver.description: Engineering and physics. The instrument was built because the measurement required it.
artifacts: DADC — forward mapping, cabinet geometry to acoustic composition
DADI — inverse inference, composition back to geometry
ADAC — adaptive closure, the forking point (GOV vs CLS)
BTL — Binaural Test Lab, the purpose-built validation environment
Higgins Operator H1 — generalization to Hilbert space

layer_2_math_book.description: CoDa (Compositional Data Analysis) as developed by Aitchison (1982/1986), Egozcue, Pawlowsky-Glahn, Tolosana-Delgado.

layer_3_alliance.description: HUF as the calibration joint of engineering discipline and compositional mathematics.
artifacts: MC-4 (Composition Monitoring) — the fourth monitoring category

invariants_carried_forward.name: 6.02 dB
invariants_carried_forward.acoustic_origin: Baffle step correction from 2π to 4π steradian radiation
invariants_carried_forward.carried_to: Binary doubling; the 2:1 compression ratio as the fundamental EITT test; the primary decimation diagnostic
invariants_carried_forward.status: Physical constant of acoustic wave propagation that became a structural constant of the compositional framework

invariants_carried_forward.name: 115 Hz·m
invariants_carried_forward.value: 115 (approximately c / 2 where c is speed of sound / π, varies slightly with conditions)
invariants_carried_forward.carried_to: Scale constant linking compositional dimension to temporal autocorrelation length; relates block width M to the characteristic timescale of the process
invariants_carried_forward.status: Empirical acoustic constant inherited into the temporal framework

invariants_carried_forward.name: Isotropic Principle
invariants_carried_forward.acoustic_origin: Omnidirectional radiation at wavelengths much larger than cabinet dimensions
invariants_carried_forward.carried_to: Barycenter of the simplex (1/D, 1/D, ..., 1/D); maximum-entropy composition; the reference state every departure is measured against

invariants_carried_forward.name: Paired-measurement doctrine
invariants_carried_forward.value: Two metrics, always; disagreement is diagnostic
invariants_carried_forward.acoustic_origin: A flat frequency response can hide directional redistribution; one curve lies
invariants_carried_forward.carried_to: Three-diagnostic protocol (TV + Aitchison + coherence residual). Metric agreement = robustness; metric disagreement = diagnostic information about the type of compositional change
invariants_carried_forward.status: Core methodology inherited from acoustic-engineering instinct

invariants_carried_forward.name: Inert measurement
invariants_carried_forward.acoustic_origin: DADC-DADI was designed as non-contact diagnostic; gains determined by the object, not by the probe
invariants_carried_forward.carried_to: 'HUF is inert'. The measurement system must not contaminate its own reading. Open-loop by mechanism, not by philosophical choice.

invariants_carried_forward.name: The GOV/CLS fork
invariants_carried_forward.value: Observation and control are architecturally separated
invariants_carried_forward.acoustic_origin: ADAC moment — the error signal existed, the loop could close, and something said: not automatically
invariants_carried_forward.carried_to: HUF-GOV (open-loop, stateless, no feedback) vs HUF-CLS (closed-loop, stateful, requires human decision). Fork is the entire doctrine.

invariants_carried_forward.name: Banach convergence / stationarity condition
invariants_carried_forward.acoustic_origin: ADAC converges when the room is slower than the adaptation loop. Fails when the room changes faster than the instrument can track.
invariants_carried_forward.carried_to: EITT's mixing assumption (A3) in EITT_HESSIAN_BOUND.md. The system must be slower than the observer. Adversarial failures in EITT_Adversarial_001.json are exactly the cases where this fails.
invariants_carried_forward.status: Mathematical condition inherited with different formalism

cross_reference_map._purpose: Every major current-repo document, with its direct ancestor in the RWA / H1 prior work.

science/eitt/EITT_HESSIAN_BOUND.md.ancestor: ADAC Banach convergence + DADI error reduction (12.5% to 4.99% over 5 iterations)
science/eitt/EITT_HESSIAN_BOUND.md.relationship: The Hessian bound formalizes what ADAC proved by construction — contractive mapping under stationarity. (A3) is the stationarity assumption that ADAC required for the loop to close.

science/eitt/EITT_WHY_IT_WORKS.md.ancestor: The Isotropic Principle + DADC gain apportionment
science/eitt/EITT_WHY_IT_WORKS.md.relationship: The shape/magnitude decomposition in §7 restates what DADC was doing: gains encode shape (apportionment), corner frequencies encode magnitude (scale). The compositional viewpoint was present in DADC before it was named.

science/eitt/EITT_SAFETY_BOUNDARIES.md.ancestor: Montreal incident — Drift Awareness, Human Primacy, Designed Failure
science/eitt/EITT_SAFETY_BOUNDARIES.md.relationship: The safety fence is the Montreal incident's lessons applied to statistical methodology. Shear bolts for EITT: document where the method must not be applied, so no one walks into a live machine.

science/coda-monitoring/.relationship: The three-diagnostic monitoring protocol is the compositional generalization of the acoustic diagnostic triple.

science/loudspeaker-analogy/.ancestor: BTL validation work, tweeter calibration, amplifier demonstrations
science/loudspeaker-analogy/.relationship: Direct preservation of the acoustic work as an active branch. Not historical — current validation domain.

science/governance/.ancestor: HUF-GOV / HUF-CLS fork at ADAC moment + Montreal incident
science/governance/.relationship: The governance doctrine is the codification of the 'do not close the loop automatically' mechanism from ADAC.

ai-refresh/HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json.relationship: The cold-start reference. When Peter built the repo to be readable by AI systems that have never seen it, he was applying the BTL principle: a purpose-built lab a first-time user can walk into.

dormant/.ancestor: Peter's instinct to preserve rather than delete speculative branches
dormant/.relationship: Reflects the 'lose nothing, discard nothing' doctrine from acoustic measurement. Every number is diagnostic until proven otherwise.

briefings/.ancestor: The Collective as a ratio-state system in itself
briefings/.relationship: Five AI systems as carrier elements contributing proportional capability. Peter as the bus between them. The framework applied to the team building the framework.

EITT_PLL_Experiment_Journal_Complete.doc.ancestor: DADC-DADI-ADAC + PLL engineering (USI Corporation, 35 years, 44kHz ultrasonic spray fluxers)
EITT_PLL_Experiment_Journal_Complete.doc.relationship: The PLL-EITT discovery is the most direct lineage connection in the entire framework. Peter WAS the PLL for 35 years — a human phase-locked loop tuning ultrasonic spray fluxers with a screwdriver and voltmeter. The σ²_A parabola IS the millivolt minimum he tuned to. The vertex IS the lock point. The ratio of 2 IS the quadratic response curve. The DADC-DADI-ADAC chain IS the measurement round-trip he performed in the Binaural Test Lab. This journal documents the moment the engineering DNA expressed itself fully in the mathematical framework.

eitt_contamination_dadc.py.relationship: The per-species contamination decomposition is the direct descendant of the DADC-DADI-ADAC acoustic measurement chain. D→A (fractions→CLR) = D→A (acoustic→digital). A→D (CLR→σ²_A) = A→D (digital→diagnostic). D→A (σ²_A→fit) = D→A (diagnostic→model). A→D (residual) = A→D (error signal). ADAC (per-species decomposition) = ADAC (back-conversion to source). The chain closes the same way in both domains.

eitt_pll_noise_squeeze.py.ancestor: PLL phase noise measurement + BTL noise floor characterisation
eitt_pll_noise_squeeze.py.relationship: The stochastic core (irreducible noise floor after squeeze) is the compositional equivalent of the VCO phase noise floor that Peter measured in every PLL tuning session. The Allan variance of the residuals is the compositional equivalent of the timing jitter specification.

exp12_gravity_deep.py.ancestor: DADC gain apportionment + Isotropic Principle + 93% bound from QCD
exp12_gravity_deep.py.relationship: The gravity study extends the compositional framework from electromagnetic/nuclear into pure gravitational domain. The gravity activation scale (~10⁷ m) is a DADC-style dimensional threshold — below it gravity contributes negligible compositional variance, above it gravity progressively dominates. The no-hair theorem reframed as compositional minimum is the Isotropic Principle applied to black holes: maximum gravitational compression → minimum entropy departure from uniformity.

The_Gravity_of_the_Situation.docx.ancestor: HUF Executive Summary + DADC flagship paper format
The_Gravity_of_the_Situation.docx.relationship: The gravity executive summary carries the engineering report DNA from the DADC-DADI paper and the Organic Digital Loudspeakers document. Format: findings → implications → testable predictions.

HUF_Programme_Conclusion.docx.ancestor: Entire HUF arc from DADC (Dec 2024) through programme completion (Apr 2026)
HUF_Programme_Conclusion.docx.relationship: The programme conclusion is the capstone document. It seals 75 systems across 44 orders of magnitude, connecting Peter's basement lab acoustic measurements to gravitational wave astronomy. The full lineage: screwdriver → simplex → universe.

exp09_master_inventory.py (updated).ancestor: BTL calibration chain — every measurement registered and tracked
exp09_master_inventory.py (updated).relationship: The master inventory is the compositional equivalent of the BTL lab's calibration register. Every system studied, its status, its flaws, its opportunities. 75 entries, zero unmeasured. The lab is complete.

operating_principle_addition.name: The past is our strength and our future
operating_principle_addition.statement: What was built in the Binaural Test Lab in 2024-2025 is the engineering DNA of everything in this repo. The math book did not invent the structure; the physics did. The screwdriver came first. Every new concept should be checked against the RWA lineage for prior embodiment. The constants that carried forward (6.02 dB, 115 Hz·m, the Isotropic Principle, paired measurement, inert probe, GOV/CLS fork, Banach convergence) are the ancestral structure; new work extends them, it does not replace them.
operating_principle_addition.application_rule: When any new document is written, the author should ask: does this have an ancestor in the RWA / H1 work? If yes, cite the ancestor. If no, note the absence explicitly. The continuity is the framework's strength.
operating_principle_addition.maintenance_rule: MASTER_LINEAGE.json is updated whenever a new current-repo document is added, with the cross_reference_map getting a new entry identifying its ancestor (or noting its absence).

update_log: v1.0 — initial establishment with arc from Isotropic Principle through DADC-DADI-ADAC, BTL, H1, RSM, to HUF/EITT
v1.0.1 — public RWA repo review added; five concept branches mapped to HUF counterparts
v1.1 — canonical HUF-GOV definition noted (2026-04-15, Peter Higgins); Coimbra welcome package added to cross_reference_map; mature expression of ADAC fork identified

v1.2 — PLL-EITT discovery lineage added (2026-04-18). Three new cross-references: Experiment Journal (PLL engineering DNA), contamination DADC script (DADC-DADI-ADAC acoustic chain descendant), noise squeeze (PLL phase noise descendant). FIXED POINT v3.2.

v1.3 — Programme completion lineage (2026-04-19). EXP-10/11/12 added. Gravity study extends the framework from electromagnetic/nuclear into pure gravitational domain. 75 systems, 44 orders of magnitude, 100% coverage. Arc entry: 'Programme complete'. Cross-references: gravity executive summary, programme conclusion, exp12_gravity_deep.py.

v1.3.1 — Terminology stabilisation (2026-04-19). HUF_COMPLETE_REFERENCE.json added to ai-refresh chain as position 2 (after FAST_REFRESH, before MATHEMATICAL_ADDENDUM). Master glossary locks all 32 canonical acronyms, 9 named concepts, 15 formulas, 24 variables, 11 constants, 12 experiments, and 7 document standards. Drift corrections applied repo-wide: 12 corrections logged. Refresh chain expanded from 5 to 8 files.
status.next_update_trigger: Addition of a new major current-repo document, or discovery of a further ancestor thread not yet mapped
status.maintenance_responsibility: Any AI working on the repo should add cross-reference entries when promoting new files, per the application_rule above

canonical_hufgov_definition.statement: HUF-GOV is a tool that produces a verifiably clean usable output to a known degree of certainty; the diagnostic of the output is open to interpretation by expert decision and open to modification by expert judgment.
canonical_hufgov_definition.rwa_ancestor: ADAC moment in DADC-DADI-ADAC chain, where the engineering instinct to close the feedback loop was met by the discipline to refuse automatic closure. The five-clause definition is the mature expression of what ADAC seeded.
canonical_hufgov_definition.current_repo_location: ai-refresh/HUF_FAST_REFRESH.json identity section; full unpacking in science/governance/HUF_GOV_CANONICAL_DEFINITION.md
canonical_hufgov_definition.relationship_note: This definition is not a new claim; it is a crystallized statement of what HUF-GOV has always been. Every earlier document in the repo can now be read as an unpacking of one or more of the five clauses.

coimbra_welcome_package.purpose: Self-contained introduction to HUF for CoDaWork 2026 attendees and new users. Six files covering welcome, success/failure, work-verification-possibilities, best-use-cases, meet-the-collective, standardization-benefits.
coimbra_welcome_package.rwa_ancestor: BTL certification documentation pattern — purpose-built lab hands off complete validation package, not just the hardware. Welcome package is the HUF-side equivalent: hands off the complete usable tool, not just the code.
coimbra_welcome_package.relationship_note: The welcome package is what the framework produces for external users. Everything upstream in the repo feeds this output. This is the ‘verifiably clean usable output’ clause of the canonical definition, manifested as documentation.
